title: Nierport VII

'''Nierport VII''' was a small, desolate [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]—one of seven such moons that orbited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eeropha]] in the [[Eeropha system]].

An impoverished backwater [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] along the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]—cold, barren and bleak—'''Nierport Seven''' had only one settlement, but served as a convenient refueling stop for [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] traveling to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. A few small guesthouses and a café called "Food and Drink" catered to pilots who could not afford even the low prices Eeropha charged. Nierport's populace clustered around the refueling station, living and laboring in buildings built of thick blocks of stone designed to keep out the wind and cold.

Native to the moon was the [[claing bush]], which alone comprised the satellite's meager vegetation. The thorny plant bloomed in a month-long summer that gave way to a numbingly cold and frigid year.

Nierport VII was the homeworld of [[Granta Omega]], who left it as a youth to attend, by way of [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senatorial]] [[Sano Sauro|sponsorship]], the prestigious [[All Science Research Academy]], from which he graduated in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Throughout his training years, Omega never returned to the Eeropha satellite, not even for the funeral of [[Tura Omega|his mother]]. In later years, however, following his growth and training, he would return. He did so—making his return a habit—whenever he failed or lost in any endeavor, business or otherwise: such as when his [[titanite]] [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] venture on the planet [[Haariden]] was [[Mission to Haariden|foiled]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].<ref name="Master of Disguise" />

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[2002]] novel ''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' by [[Jude Watson]], in which Nierport VII first appeared, the system was stated to be within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]], near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. However the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the system in the Colonies region.
